title: No Smoke
description: Removes the obtrusive smoke from fire and campfires.
body:
To enhance the PvP experience in Vanilla Minecraft, I created the No Smoke resource pack. Gamemodes like Crystal, Cart, Classic, UHC etc. often suffer from the intrusive smoke produced by fires which can significantly hamper visibility. Additionally there are a plethora of maps designed for PvP that use campfires that create a very hefty amount of particles, lowering performance, and even sometimes affecting gameplay. Unable to find a solution on Modrinth, I took it upon myself to put one together.

No Smoke removes this visual clutter, providing a clearer view during intense gameplay. When used in conjunction with [Low Fire](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/low-on-fire) and [No Explosion Particles](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/no-explosion-particles), this pack not only enhances visibility but also reduces lag. Elevate your competitive edge with a cleaner, smoother PvP experience using No Smoke!

### Caution when using in survival! 
**This pack will remove all particles that use the generic particle type, making particles like Dragon's Breath invisible.**

Check out No Smoke's [gallery](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/nosmoke/gallery) to see the difference!
